hero.headline: Run your K-pop merch & photocard store without the spreadsheet chaos
hero.subheadline: Track orders, collect payment proofs, and manage your whole drop in one place — built for sellers moving albums, photocards, and fan merch.
hero.ctaSecondary: I'll set up your first store for you

problem.title: Your current workflow is breaking
items: Random screenshots for every photocard slot
problem.escalation: And it gets worse with every drop.
problem.outro: It doesn't scale past your third drop.

solution.title: One clean store for every drop
items: A storefront for your merch, albums, and photocards
They upload proof of payment themselves
solution.outro: No more switching between five apps to run one group order.

features.title: Built for how you actually sell

items.title: Order tracking
items.description: Every order, every buyer, one dashboard. No more spreadsheets.

items.title: Payment proof collection
items.description: Buyers upload screenshots straight to their order. No more DM chaos.

items.title: Order status control
items.description: Mark orders Pending, Paid, or Verified. Stay in control of every slot.

items.title: Your own store page
items.description: One link for merch, albums, and photocards — instead of five messy forms.

cta.title: Ready to simplify your next drop?
cta.content: I'll personally help you set up your first store. No setup stress, no risk.
cta.ctaPrimary: Try it for your next drop

items.question: Do I need a payment gateway?
items.answer: No — buyers upload proof of payment manually. Bank transfer, Wise, PayPal, whatever you already use.

items.question: Can I sell photocards, not just full group orders?
items.answer: Yes — built for albums, individual photocard slots, and merch drops alike.

items.question: Is this free?
items.answer: Free for early sellers while we build out the product.
